title: Plan an event replay
description: Re-process historical events safely by relying on consumer idempotency, isolating side effects, and bounding scope.
body: Steps: 1. Confirm target consumers are idempotent so reprocessing does not double-apply. 2. Identify side effects that must NOT re-fire on replay (emails, charges) and gate or disable them. 3. Choose the replay window (offset/timestamp range) and run against a rebuilt read model or a shadow target first. 4. Compare rebuilt state to current before cutover. 5. Re-enable live consumption. Rollback point: replay into a shadow store, not production state. Validation: replayed state matches expected, no external side effect re-fired, confirmed by a dry-run diff.
